items.title: Apple hails 'extraordinary' iPhone demand as boss Tim Cook heads out
items.summary: Cook is preparing to bow out after 15 years at the helm and hand over to John Ternus.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Apple was surprised by AI-driven demand for Macs
items.summary: Apple said it will be supply-constrained on Mac mini, Studio, and Neo in the next quarter, too.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.

items.title: Russia cloaks launch schedule after spaceport falls in Ukraine's sights
items.summary: "We had serious inbound attempts to the cosmodrome that day."
